title: SpaceX’s IPO Triumph, Anthropic’s Fable Fumble, OpenAI’s Price War
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss SpaceX's IPO success, Anthropic's Fable product rollout issues, and OpenAI's potential price cuts. They debate whether AI models are becoming commodities and whether SpaceX's high valuation reflects broader market dynamics or is itself anomalous.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy work through three stories: SpaceX's IPO success, problems in Anthropic's Fable product rollout, and OpenAI's potential price cuts. The conversation turns on two debates: whether AI models are sliding toward commodity status, and whether SpaceX's high valuation signals broader market dynamics or stands as an anomaly. The discussion connects pricing pressure and product strategy to the larger question of how AI value gets captured.
